label: The Fool
story: This is an unknown starting point. A young man in colorful clothes stands at the edge of a cliff, his gaze fixed on the distant sky. A little white dog at his feet is barking frantically as a warning, but he seems not to care about the abyss beneath his feet. In his left hand, he holds a white rose symbolizing purity, and in his right hand, a bag carries untapped potential. He strides forward lightly in the sunlight, as if declaring: I carry a pure heart and am ready to embrace this unknown adventure.

details.content: Right at his feet—steep, with a bottomless abyss below.
The unknown; a major risk; the boundary between safety and danger.
The key action scene of the deck: a “leap of faith.” It suggests the querent’s move looks crazy to others, but they ignore consequences and carry absolute courage into the unknown.
Jumping at his feet, almost nipping his heel.
Instinct; intuition; a loyal warning signal.
It plays the role of “intuition.” When reason (human) can’t judge what’s ahead, instinct (animal) raises the alarm. Even if the road is risky, following your gut keeps you protected.
Held in the left hand, relaxed posture, pure white.
Pure motives; innocence; desire without ulterior agenda.
A mirror of the Fool’s inner state. He risks not for money or power, but simply “because I want to go.” That childlike sincerity is his strongest talisman.

upright.summary: Take the leap of faith; the unknown journey itself is the gift.

scenarios.content:
### Lighthearted romance / Love at first sight. 
A relationship mode that is unbound and lives in the moment. Both parties enjoy the happiness of the now and are unwilling to be tied down by promises. It is a journey full of fun and freshness, loving purely like a child.

### Venture into new territory / Be bold in your attempts.
This is the time to break the mold and look for new job opportunities or start a side business. Your creativity and unique perspective are your greatest assets. Although you may lack experience, that fearless drive of a young bull will bring unexpected rewards.

### Unexpected wealth / Casual spending. 
There might be unstable sources of income or unexpected small favors. The financial awareness is relatively weak, and one tends to spend based on feelings. There is a desire to make some impulsive investments.

reversed.summary: Jumping without considering risks will only lead to falling into the abyss. True adventure requires rational navigation.

scenarios.content:
### Not taking responsibility / Avoiding commitment. 
The relationship is full of uncertainty; one party may act like an immature child, focusing only on their own fun while ignoring their partner's feelings. Be wary of the "drifter" mentality that comes and goes without wanting to take responsibility.

### Being too rash/with insufficient planning. 
Having only ideas but no action plans, or because of being overly idealistic, ignoring the realistic risks. Be cautious of quitting a job or taking on a mess out of impulse. One needs to come down from the clouds and get back to the ground, being practical.

### Blind investment / Financial crisis. 
Losses occur due to a lack of judgment, or people squander their savings in pursuit of so-called "freedom". At this time, it is not advisable to engage in any high-risk gambling-style investments; instead, you must take good care of your finances.
